prompt: Mujhe career aur future ko leke bahut anxiety ho rahi hai.
Job performance ke pressure se raat ko neend nahi aati.
Main result ke darr ki wajah se action hi nahi le pa raha.
Mera dimaag hamesha outcome soch kar restless rehta hai.
Career mein uncertainty hai, kaunsa step loon samajh nahi aa raha.
Mujhe ghar par jaldi gussa aa jata hai aur baad mein regret hota hai.
Frustration mein main hurtful baatein bol deta hoon.
I react impulsively when I am angry and then feel guilty.
Mujhe choti choti baat pe irritation ho jati hai.
मैं गुस्से में अपने परिवार को गलत बोल देता/देती हूँ।
I feel stuck and directionless despite working hard.
मुझे समझ नहीं आता जीवन में सही मार्ग कौन सा है।
I feel empty even after achieving milestones.
Duty aur comfort ke beech main confuse hoon.
I want purpose but I keep feeling hopeless.
Main routine bana leta hoon par continue nahi kar pata.
I procrastinate and delay important work till deadline.
Study ke time mind bahut bhatakta hai, focus nahi hota.
I cannot control my senses and keep getting distracted by phone.
मुझे अनुशासन चाहिए लेकिन आदतें टूट जाती हैं।
I compare myself with my friends and feel inferior.
Mujhe dusron ki success dekh ke jalan hoti hai.
Social media comparison se self-worth down ho jati hai.
I crave recognition and praise all the time.
I feel bitter when others get appreciation quickly.
रिश्तों में मैं जल्दी प्रतिक्रिया दे देता/देती हूँ, शांति कैसे रखूँ?
Mera मन हमेशा future ko लेकर tension mein rehta hai.
I am confused whether to continue job or start business.
Main kaam karta hoon par result ke stress se toot jata hoon.
मैं बार-बार दूसरों से तुलना करके दुखी हो जाता/जाती हूँ।
